objective: the underlying psychological stressor, coping pattern, or support need the person is experiencing

clusters.name: Seek Emotional Support and Understanding
clusters.description: Topics focused on seeking and providing emotional support during difficult times.

clusters.name: Support for Mental Health Challenges
clusters.description: Conversations focus on feelings of depression, self-worth issues, and the need for emotional support.

clusters.name: Coping with COVID Isolation and Anxiety
clusters.description: Conversations reflect feelings of loneliness, depression, and the impact of lockdown during the pandemic.

clusters.name: Coping with Depression and Negative Thoughts
clusters.description: These conversations focus on struggles with depression, negative thinking, and seeking coping strategies.

clusters.name: Emotional Isolation and Relationship Struggles
clusters.description: Conversations centered around feelings of loneliness, depression, and conflicts in relationships.

clusters.name: Grieving Recent Losses and Seeking Support
clusters.description: These conversations revolve around individuals coping with the death of loved ones and pets, expressing deep sadness and a need for emotional support.

clusters.name: Coping with Loss and Isolation
clusters.description: Conversations reflecting feelings of loneliness, grief, and the need for emotional support.

clusters.name: Coping with Family Stress and Abuse
clusters.description: These conversations highlight experiences of emotional distress related to family dynamics, including conflict and abuse.

clusters.name: Coping with Anxiety and Sleep Issues
clusters.description: These conversations revolve around anxiety, insomnia, and seeking coping strategies.

clusters.name: Navigate Relationship Challenges and Breakups
clusters.description: Topics centered on navigating the complexities of relationships, breakups, and emotional turmoil.

clusters.name: Friendship Betrayal and Emotional Turmoil
clusters.description: Conversations centered around feelings of betrayal and anger from friends and ex-partners.

clusters.name: Navigating Relationship Breakups and Infidelity
clusters.description: These conversations revolve around emotional struggles related to breakups, infidelity, and the challenges of moving on.

clusters.name: Coping with Breakup Heartache
clusters.description: This group shares experiences and emotions related to dealing with breakups.

clusters.name: Navigating Personal Turmoil and Relationships
clusters.description: Discussions centered around coping with personal conflicts and emotional distress in relationships.

clusters.name: Navigating Frustrating Friendships
clusters.description: These conversations focus on issues of communication, misunderstanding, and emotional distress in friendships.

clusters.name: Manage Job and Career Stress
clusters.description: Topics focused on managing stress and anxiety related to job searching, loss, and workplace challenges.

clusters.name: Job Search Anxiety and Frustration
clusters.description: Conversations reflect feelings of anxiety, frustration, and depression related to job searching challenges.

clusters.name: Job Loss Anxiety Amid Pandemic
clusters.description: Conversations centered on fears and stresses related to job stability during the COVID-19 crisis.

clusters.name: Job-Related Anxiety and Uncertainty
clusters.description: Conversations reflecting anxiety and stress about job security and workplace challenges.

clusters.name: Coping with Job-related Stress and Financial Anxiety
clusters.description: Conversations centered around the challenges of job loss, financial strain, and the emotional toll it takes.

clusters.name: Job Loss and Depression Support
clusters.description: Conversations centered around the emotional impact of job loss and seeking support during difficult economic times.

clusters.name: Academic Pressure and Stress
clusters.description: Conversations about stress related to academic challenges and fears of failure.

clusters.name: Coping with Pandemic Challenges
clusters.description: Topics that address the unique stressors and emotional challenges brought on by the pandemic.

clusters.name: Coping with Isolation and Pandemic Stress
clusters.description: This group shares experiences of loneliness and mental health challenges during the pandemic.

clusters.name: Coping with Pandemic-Induced Loneliness and Stress
clusters.description: Individuals sharing experiences of loneliness, stress, and coping strategies during the pandemic.

clusters.name: Address Academic Pressures
clusters.description: Topics focused on stress and challenges related to academic life and performance expectations.

clusters.name: Academic Pressure and Stress
clusters.description: Conversations about stress related to academic challenges and fears of failure.

clusters.name: Academic Stress and Anxiety Support
clusters.description: Conversations centered around stress, anxiety, and challenges related to academic pressures.

clusters.name: Other / unassigned
clusters.description: Clusters not placed by meta-pass.

clusters.name: Navigating Workplace Challenges and Stressors
clusters.description: Conversations centered on coping with difficult work dynamics and seeking support.

clusters.name: Struggles with Motivation and Emotional Distress
clusters.description: These conversations revolve around challenges with motivation, emotional struggles, and seeking support.

clusters.name: Navigating Parental Pressure and Expectations
clusters.description: Conversations center on stress and anxiety stemming from parental expectations in education and personal choices.
